title: Requirements Collection Schema
description: Standalone requirements file containing functional, non-functional, and additional requirements. This is the authoritative source for requirements in the canvas — auto-generated from PRD/requirementsInventory on first load.

functional.description: Functional requirements — what the system must do

nonFunctional.description: Non-functional requirements — quality attributes (performance, security, scalability, etc.)

additional.description: Additional requirements — architectural constraints, technical decisions, compliance, etc.
